title: Delightful Buddycards
description: Farm up some new Buddycards with Farmer's Delight Integration!
body:
![Buddycards logo](https://imgur.com/I3j4Ae6.png)
**Farm up some new Buddycards from the Delightful set with Farmer's Delight Integration!**

A new set of Buddycards is here for you to collect! Chop up your unwanted cards into diced Buddycards, farm up some Buddybeans, and cook up some new packs of the Delightful set, with 18 new Buddycards themed around the Farmer's Delight mod! Every pack has some Buddygummies, and along with Buddybeans, you can make some sweet treats with them like Buddybean Pie! The Delightful set also adds in the traditional things every other Buddycards set comes with, like Binders, Playmats, and the typical varieties of Medals. You can also make knifes with the Buddysteel materials found within Buddycards.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kJ-u9cfj5r0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Requires Buddycards Core: https://modrinth.com/mod/buddycards
